text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Takeoff!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...What's that? A kind of cake?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
"Taking off"... is when an aircraft gains speed to lift up and into the
sky. Also implied is that it maintains its ascending trajectory.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Mayano, do you mean to say you wish for Oguri to fly? But... by what
means? And how does that solve our star dilemma?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Cool your jets, Hayahide! ☆ The marvelous thing we found is... a giant
sleigh!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: A sleigh...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! That's super awesome! And we just saw a giant sleigh that
crashed down!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Oh! The one you mentioned!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that one! Seemed like it was still airworthy, so we pulled it on
over! ☆

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Aha. Your idea is to use that sleigh to haul the star back here. I'm not
sure what that has to do with taking off though...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ah! But that solves our problem. Okay, Mayano, where is it?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wait right here! Me and Marvey will get it ready!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hold on a moment! Do you seriously intend to do this, Oguri?
Transportation issue solved or not, there's still the matter of the
blizzard.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: This isn't enough to assure your fans. You really should reconsider!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But... if I don't do this, I'm not being true to... the person they
admire...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Wha...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
My fans like me because I win in the hardest races. So how can I back
down... when it really counts?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
They don't cheer for me just because. They do it because I never
change who I am. So I'm going to make them proud... one more time.

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text: Oguri, you...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm really trying to take your feelings into account. I want nothing
more than a miracle to happen and the snow to stop...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Then why don't you make a miracle happen, Hayahide?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Wh-what do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You're always thinking up a storm over how to solve problems. I bet
you already figured this out... You're just not sayin' it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I know you want to help her. So be honest and spit it out, would ya?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's rather odd for you to be explaining things to me. But you're
correct. I may have a way to raise her chance of success, but I can't—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on! I know you can do it, so just do it! You're tellin' me you
can trust Ticket but not me?!

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
And... all of us fans here want this too! Please, Oguri! Help us get the
star!

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
Today isn't just any old holiday party. We wanted to get you out of
the slump you've been in.

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
But to tell the truth... Maybe some small part of us was satisfied just
to watch you run.

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
Even satisfied to see you lose, so long as we could keep cheering for
you. You've already inspired the best in us—maybe we became too
content with that.

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
So if you say you can do it... we'll trust in you no matter what! We're
your fans because you take on the biggest challenges after all!

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
Tell us the safest way possible to do it! Taishin believes that you can
figure this out, so... we believe in you too!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, what a responsibility... But all right. Oguri, I trust that your
legs are up for this?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I... Of course! My legs are why everybody likes me. I have full
confidence.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Then we'll plan this fully intending to traverse deep snowfall. I need
to confirm something quickly with the cabin manager.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fans
text_block_list.text:
Be careful, Oguri!
Stay safe, okay?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey, it's a message from Oguri! She says she made it to the bottom!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ah... That's good to hear. All that remains is to secure the star and
come back up the path.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Hayahide, you're so cool how you came up with that idea! ☆ There's
no way she'll get lost if she follows the ropeway!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fans
text_block_list.text:
I hope she's okay...
If anyone can do it, it's her.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...Mayano, Marvelous. I wish to borrow your creative powers. Can you
think of any way to ease the minds of her fans?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hold it. I... might have an idea. Hayahide, be Santa for a while.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Pardon?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Wooow! You look simply marvelous! ☆★

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Uh, are you certain? I don't appear strange like this? Ugh, I think my
headpiece is falling off!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I put it on tight. Yeah, lookin' good. It's a good thing I
helped with the design. If Ticket went with her first idea, you'd be
wearing a beard right now.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But, Taishin, this...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Uh, well... It was actually supposed to be a surprise from Ticket. But
it's her bad for being late.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You're always thinking about me and Ticket... never yourself. That's
why she thought you'd be perfect for this... Get it?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But, you know... It's a big deal to be Santa. So maybe you could just
be happy like all us fools for once, you dummy.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Taishin... You're right. I can't deny myself the joy of
receiving such a wonderful gift.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Now it's my turn to take the limelight. I'm sorry, Oguri, but... I have to
steal all of your fans for a bit.

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
Your hair's so big and fluffy!
It's just like Santa's beard! I wanna make a giant braid with it!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What?! Did someone just suggest that my head is large?! I am merely
accentuating my frizzy hair for the occasion!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
Run backwards now!
Yeah, Santa lady! It'll be awesome!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hah, this is going great. Everyone's so into you. Well? Don't leave
your fans hanging.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ergh! Fine, but I will only do this once! ...Please, Oguri. Come back
quickly!
